title: AWS Resource Policy Evaluation
summary: Intermediate LAB teaching how AWS resource-based policies participate in authorization decisions alongside identity policies, boundaries, SCPs, and explicit deny.
objectives: Explain what a resource-based policy is
Differentiate resource policies from identity policies
Reason about same-account and cross-account resource access
Explain how explicit deny in a resource policy affects authorization
Understand how S3, KMS, SQS, SNS, Lambda, and IAM role trust policies use resource-side authorization
Prepare for Principal LABs involving cross-account trust, PassRole, and role chaining
